title: Why Novo Nordisk's Ireland expansion is key to fighting off Eli Lilly
summary_full: Novo Nordisk is investing in a facility in Ireland as it expands its production capacities of the newly launched Wegovy pill, the Danish drugmaker said Monday.
summary_public: Novo Nordisk is investing in a facility in Ireland as it expands its production capacities of the newly launched Wegovy pill, the Danish drugmaker said Monday.

IE.label: positive
IE.evidence: Novo Nordisk is investing in a facility in Ireland
